basics.description: Deploys a Microsoft Sentinel playbook (Azure Logic App) that disables on-prem AD accounts and/or forces password resets via the Microsoft Defender for Identity Action Account (gMSA). [Documentation](https://github.com/Lockbase-Cyber/Sentinel-Playbooks/tree/main/mdi-disable-playbook).

options.text: Pick the Log Analytics workspace that Microsoft Sentinel is onboarded to. All other parameters have sensible defaults — review them on the next page if you want to customize.

basics.name: sentinelWorkspace
basics.label: Sentinel workspace
basics.toolTip: The Log Analytics workspace that Microsoft Sentinel is configured on. The Logic App's managed identity will be granted Sentinel Responder on this workspace's resource group.

options.text: All fields on this page are optional. Defaults are production-sane: both actions enabled, Logic App name auto-generated, Graph permissions granted post-deploy via Cloud Shell script (no bootstrap MI required).

elements.name: logicAppName
elements.label: Logic App name (optional)
elements.toolTip: Leave blank to auto-generate as 'pa-mdi-disable-<8-char-hash>'. If provided, must be 1-64 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens.

validations.message: 1-64 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens, must start and end with alphanumeric.

elements.name: actionsToEnable
elements.label: Actions to enable per matched identity
elements.toolTip: Both actions enabled by default. At least one must be selected.

allowedValues.label: Disable AD account
allowedValues.description: Disable the on-prem AD account via MDI Action Account.

allowedValues.label: Force password reset
allowedValues.description: Force password reset at next logon via MDI Action Account.

options.text: Only change these if you understand the trade-offs. The default Graph-permission strategy (post-deploy script) requires zero pre-provisioning. The 'deploymentScripts' strategy is fully automated but requires a bootstrap user-assigned managed identity that already has AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All on Microsoft Graph.

elements.name: graphPermsStrategy
elements.label: Graph permissions grant strategy
elements.toolTip: Post-deploy: you run scripts/grant-graph-permissions.sh in Cloud Shell after this deploy completes, using your admin credentials. deploymentScripts: this template grants Graph perms automatically using a pre-provisioned bootstrap UAMI.

elements.name: bootstrapUami
elements.label: Bootstrap user-assigned managed identity
elements.toolTip: Required when 'deploymentScripts' strategy is selected. Must already have the AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All app role on Microsoft Graph. See docs/permissions.md for the one-time setup.
